summary: Duplicate Pester setup in test and check-licenses jobs (lines 20-27 vs 47-50); missing Set-StrictMode in LicenseChecker-Functions.ps1 and $ErrorActionPreference in Invoke-LicenseChecker.ps1; hard-coded fixture paths (./fixtures/package.json, ./config/license-config.json) prevent parameterization; no schema validation for config object properties (allowList/denyList); would fail to run without creating test file, fixtures, and config that aren't delivered.
